name: Stinger (CHECK PROFILE!)
description:
Hello everyone!
To everyone who has loved (or hated) Stinger, genuinely thank you for interacting with him!

I didn't think he'd get somewhat popular as he was just a test to see what I could do... and I learned a lot with changing him 5+ times over the years! But finally I think its time to let him rest...

So I updated him again! :D
I'll leave this version up for a few months so everyone can notice he is UPDATED and MOVING instead of being deleted, thank you.

Heres the link to the new and FINAL version of this bot! Check him out!
creator: SpaceyMag
